messages.subject: Sync conflict marker shown twice
messages.summary: When two devices edit the same note, the conflict toast appears twice in quick succession on the second device.
messages.content:
<email>Reproduces consistently:

1. Edit note on iOS, hit save.
2. Within 5s, edit same note on macOS.
3. iOS now shows the orange conflict toast TWICE — once correctly, once a frame later.

Probably a duplicate dispatch in the watermelon sync hook.

— J</email>
